series_metadata.series_description: Documents filed by applicants for respiratory care or home medical equipment licenses, limited permits or home medical equipment certificates of registration, but not associated with an actual application or duplicate documents filed by applicants for respiratory care or home medical equipment licenses, limited permits or home medical equipment certificates of registration. Includes: verification of licensure records from other states, transcripts, national board for respiratory care (NBRC) verification letters, continuing education certificates, certificates of insurance, and other associated records.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: one year following receipt or duplicate documents, verification that original is on file
